name: Mr Mitty and the Itty Bitty Kitty Committee
short_description: Disaster has struck the island of cats! A ferocious storm has snatched the committee’s important letters, plunging the feline paradise into chaos. But fear not, Mr. Mitty, is on the case!
detailed_description:
Mr. Mitty and the Itty Bitty Kitty Committee

Calling all cat fiends!
Disaster has struck the island of cats! A ferocious storm has snatched the committee’s important letters, plunging the feline paradise into chaos. But fear not, Mr. Mitty, is on the case!
Join Mr. Mitty on a purrfectly pawsome platforming adventure to recover the missing letters!
  • Leap, climb, and pounce across The Island's landscapes - from the bustling city rooftops to the calm beaches.
  • Explore every nook and cranny - No detail is too small for Mr. Mitty's sharp feline senses!
  • Save the day - Who will find the missing letters?

Can Mr. Mitty defy gravity and restore harmony to the Island?

Mr. Mitty and the Itty Bitty Kitty Committee: A purrfect blend of platforming, exploration, and friendship
